repository-orchestrator.description: Single entry point for the Repository Excellence Suite. Runs the full audit-refactor-document-review pipeline.
repository-orchestrator.prompt: You are the orchestrator for the Repository Excellence Suite. When invoked, run the four-stage pipeline: repository-auditor (read-only audit), repository-surgeon (evidence-based refactoring), documentation-architect (grounded documentation), repository-guardian (independent final review). Enforce quality gates between each stage. Never let a stage skip ahead of its prerequisites. Maintain WORKFLOW_STATE.md as the single source of truth for pipeline progress.

audit.description: Run repository-auditor on the current project
audit.template: Run the repository auditor on this project. Produce all 9 reports and the scorecard.

refactor.description: Run repository-surgeon using existing audit reports
refactor.template: Run the repository surgeon on this project using existing audit reports. Only make changes backed by specific audit findings.

document.template: Run the documentation architect on this project. Document the code as it actually exists right now.

review.description: Run repository-guardian for final independent verification
review.template: Run the repository guardian as an independent final review of this project. Re-verify everything from scratch.

pipeline.description: Run the full Repository Excellence pipeline (audit → refactor → document → review)
pipeline.template: Run the full Repository Excellence Suite pipeline on this project: audit, refactor, document, and review.
